hero.title: Hi, I’m Dival Sehgal
hero.subtitle: Senior Frontend Engineer — Designing and building scalable frontend systems with a focus on performance, architecture, and clean engineering practices.

about.title: About Me
paragraphs: I'm a Senior Frontend Engineer with 6+ years of experience building performant and scalable web applications. I specialise in developing data-driven dashboards, multi-brand eCommerce platforms, and media and wellness marketplaces. I focus on creating scalable design systems and optimising frontend performance using real-world analytics and user behaviour insights. Outside of work, I enjoy hiking, exploring national parks and wildlife sanctuaries, and spending time in nature it helps me reset and approach complex problems with clarity.

experience.company: EPAM System Client: Princess Auto (Canadian Retail)

description.text: Designed and standardised AI-assisted development workflows integrating LLM tools (Copilot, Claude) and MCP servers (Figma, Jira) with structured prompt engineering, boosting team productivity by ~10%.

Led end-to-end Contentful CMS migration, defining content models, workflows, and rollout strategy enabling marketing teams to independently manage listings, showcases, guides, campaign pages, and recommendation modules.
Built and scaled 30+ reusable UI components aligned with a unified design system and established a monorepo architecture with shared core packages to enable scalable frontend development.
Built scheduled serverless jobs via Azure Functions to auto-generate XML sitemaps for large-scale product inventory, improving SEO crawl efficiency.
Optimised Core Web Vitals (LCP, FCP, CLS) across critical pages, significantly improving performance scores and user experience.
Rebuilt the Advisor Dashboard into a data-driven insights platform with real-time charts and analytics, driving a 25% increase in engagement through Hotjar-informed UX optimizations.
Migrated the Advisor Onboarding Flow from Ember.js to Next.js while integrating Tipalti and Jumio for compliant tax and identity verification.
Consolidated Feedback, Availability Manager, and Customer Support modules into a unified experience leveraging pub/sub and polling for real-time chat availability.
Integrated Zendesk Chatbot to streamline support flows and reduce manual response overhead.
Led the Shukran Delivery Project for Max Fashion and Home Centre, integrating same-day delivery across multiple store locations and driving a 25% increase in non-GDMS orders.
Built personalized banners via Amplience CMS and leveraged Monetate to inject and test variations on production without engineering deployments.
Enhanced flash sales and recommendation rails UX, driving a 30% boost in user engagement across all Landmark brands.
Revamped area location and product listing filters, improving accessibility and product discoverability by 20%.
Optimized website performance via Lighthouse audits, reducing page load time and cumulative layout shifts, decreasing bounce rate by 20%.
Developed a KYC Dashboard for Stanza Living that aggregated booking requests into a centralized management interface with Aadhaar API integration.
Built an Ad Campaign Dashboard with campaign analytics, performance tracking, and workflow automation reducing manual management overhead.
Architected role-based routing and an atomic component structure for Narayan Edtech's platform to enable scalable feature development.
Developed an internal Shuttle Service App with an Admin Dashboard for managing client visits, ride-sharing, cab bookings, and seat allocation.

projects.name: Travel Template Generator
projects.description: A professional web application designed to create, customise, and export structured travel itineraries with a dynamic theme engine and high-fidelity PDF support.

projects.name: Excel Clone
projects.description: Spreadsheet application supporting cell editing, formulas, and formatting with a performant React architecture.

projects.name: RPC Game
projects.description: Real-time multiplayer Rock Paper Scissors game using WebSockets with queue-based matchmaking.

projects.name: Booking Clone
projects.description: Full-stack hotel booking platform with search, filtering, and management features.

projects.name: YT Bookmarker
projects.description: Chrome extension to save and manage YouTube timestamps using browser APIs and IndexedDB.
